texto: No one stands at the beginning of a race and then finds himself at the end having never taken a step forward. And if that were to happen—the sweat and struggle avoided—what stories would he have to tell? The goal includes the journey
autor: it's all part of the dream.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de it's all part of the dream. que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “No one stands at the beginning of a race and then finds himself at the end having never taken a s…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, richelle-e-goodrich, smile-anyway, com foco em viagem e termino.
